zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy Ier de Dampierre於1091年出生在法國哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯時，他的父親Thibaut de Dampierre31歲，母親Isabel de Montlhery18歲。他和Helvide de Baudemont至少有2個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1151年在法國德 艾斯特奧布達皮享年60歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy Ier de Dampierre于1091年出生在法国哈帕格-亞登奧布特洛也斯时，他的父亲Thibaut de Dampierre31岁，母亲Isabel de Montlhery18岁。他和Helvide de Baudemont至少有2个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于1151年在法国德 艾斯特奧布達皮享年60岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

nameMeanings.name: Ier
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: and Norwegian vernacular form of   Peter .

variants.name: Peter
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy Ier de Dampierre was born in 1091, in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, his father, Thibaut de Dampierre, was 31 and his mother, Isabel de Montlhery, was 18. He had at least 2 sons and 2 daughters with Helvide de Baudemont. He died in 1151, in Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, at the age of 60.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy Ier de Dampierre est né en 1091, à Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, France, son père, Thibaut de Dampierre, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isabel de Montlhery, avait 18 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles avec Helvide de Baudemont. Il est décédé en 1151, à Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, France, à l’âge de 60 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy Ier de Dampierre 1091 in Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Thibaut de Dampierre 31 und seine Mutter Isabel de Montlhery 18. Er hatte mit Helvide de Baudemont mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1151 im Alter von 60 Jahren in Dampierre, Aube, Großer Osten, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Ier de Dampierre è nato il nel 1091 nel Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, il suo padre, Thibaut de Dampierre, aveva 31 anni e il suo madre, Isabel de Montlhery, aveva 18 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie con Helvide de Baudemont. Morì nel 1151, nel Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, all'età di 60 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy Ier de Dampierreが1091年にフランスチャンプアグネ-アルデンアウベトロイスで生まれた時，父Thibaut de Dampierreは31歳，母Isabel de Montlheryは18歳であった。彼はHelvide de Baudemontとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1151年にフランスグランド エストアウベダンパエアで60歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy Ier de Dampierre(이)가 1091년 프랑스 챔파그니-아르데니 오브 트로예스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thibaut de Dampierre(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Isabel de Montlhery(은)는 18세였다. 그는 Helvide de Baudemont(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1151년 프랑스 그랜드 에스트 오브 댐피르에서 60세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy Ier de Dampierre nasceu em 1091, em Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, França, seu pai, Thibaut de Dampierre, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isabel de Montlhery, tinha 18 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas com Helvide de Baudemont. Ele faleceu em 1151, em Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, França, com 60 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy Ier de Dampierre родился в 1091 г. в местности троиесь, ауб, чампагне-арденн, Франция, его отцу по имени Thibaut de Dampierre было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isabel de Montlhery, 18. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери от Helvide de Baudemont. Он умер в 1151 г. в местности дампьирр, ауб, гранд эст, Франция в возрасте 60 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy Ier de Dampierre nació en 1091, en Troyes, Aube, Champagne-Ardenne, Francia, su papá, Thibaut de Dampierre, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Isabel de Montlhery, tenía 18 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas con Helvide de Baudemont. Murió en 1151, en Dampierre, Aube, Grand Est, Francia, a la edad de 60 años.
